basic_details.job_title: APS Jaipur Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Army Public School Jaipur (APS Jaipur) has published the Teaching, Non-Teaching & Administrative Staff Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 18 Teaching, Non-Teaching & Administrative Staff positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 55 years and holding the educational qualifications as per post details are eligible to apply online/offline at apsjaipur.edu.in. The application process will be active from 18-05-2026 to 31-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age Relaxation: Fresh candidates (less than 5 yrs experience) below 40 yrs. Experienced candidates (Minimum 5 years' experience in the appropriate category in the last 10 yrs) Below 55 yrs.

qualification.details: PGT History: Two years Integrated Post Graduate MA/M.Sc. Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in concerned subject with at least 50% aggregate marks OR Post-Graduation with minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in History. B.Ed. or equivalent degree from an NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi. Knowledge of Computer Application. PRT (Computer Science): B.E or B.Tech (Computer Science/IT) from a recognized University or equivalent Degree with 50% marks OR B.Sc (CS)/BCA with 50% marks. B.Ed. or equivalent degree from a recognized University with minimum 50% marks OR 02 years Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed)/ 04 years B.El.Ed with minimum 50% marks in each. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi. Counsellor: Master's / Bachelor's in psychology (Clinical/ Counselling/ Applied/ Educational) OR Master's in Social Work (Mental Health / Counselling) OR Bachelor's/Master's in any subject + Diploma in School Counseling / Child Guidance and Counseling. The appointed person shall possess the competencies for SEL delivery, crisis intervention, identification of mental health concerns, parent/teacher sensitization, confidentiality etc. The appointed person must also undergo 50 hours of capacity building programs (CBPs) preferred by the Board for psycho-social counseling. Lower Divisional Clerk (LDC): Graduate or ten years of service as a clerk (for Ex-Servicemen). Computer Literate. Knowledge of Computer MS Office (Speed 12000 key depression per hour). Basic knowledge of accounting. Preference will be given to an ex-serviceman in clerk category. Receptionist: Graduate or ten years of service as a clerk (for Ex-Servicemen). Computer Literate. Knowledge of Computer MS Office (Speed 12000 key depression per hour). Basic knowledge of accounting. Good communication skills. CLT (Computer Lab Technician): Minimum 10+2 with one year diploma in Computer Science. Knowledge of Hardware, Peripheral and Networking. Science Lab Attendant: 10+2 with Science. Computer Literate. Nursing Assistant: 10+2 and diploma in nursing with minimum five years of experience (Preferably Female). Assistant Librarian: B.Lib. Science or Graduate with diploma in Library Science from a recognized institute and computer literate. Driver: Preferably matriculate or 10 years' service for Ex-Servicemen. Valid Driving License of Light/Heavy vehicle. Aayas (FW): At least 8th pass. Experience in any recognized school will preferred. Driver (FW): Preferably matriculate or 10 years' service for Ex-Servicemen. Valid Driving License of Light/Heavy vehicle.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for APS Jaipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: apsjaipur.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 is 31st May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies announced for various Teaching, Non-Teaching & Administrative Staff posts in the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to APS Jaipur posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to most posts in the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 is 55 years, with specific relaxations for experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the PGT History post?
faq.answer: For the PGT History post, candidates need a Master's degree in History with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. or equivalent degree. Specific integrated course qualifications are also accepted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 250/- for General and OBC category candidates. No fee is mentioned for other categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of Army Public School Jaipur, which is www.apsjaipur.edu.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions announced in the APS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 is Ad-hoc.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Army Public School Jaipur?
faq.answer: The official website of Army Public School Jaipur is www.apsjaipur.edu.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
